APPROVE
Fix tracks lastRequestSentAt (reset on user/tool_result events) and emits per-call latency_ms distinct from cumulative elapsed_ms. CHANGELOG documents legacy traces. Regression test asserts divergence, bounded second-turn latency, and sum<=elapsed.
